review_title: SEO Simplified by Morningscore.io
description: Morningscore has been my SEO steppingstone. With all the hype, it's hard to determine where to start. With prioritized task lists, competitor insights, this is the tool.
author: Ken M.
pros: Morningscore identifies the key metric for SEO, the Google Adwords value of your organic search, by keyword. Add three competitors to see their keyword strategies, and you’ve completed step one of onboarding. Starting out, view prioritized tasks to improve your SEO, with valuable resources a click away. If you’re an SEO expert you’ll appreciate reducing your SEO subscription spend. Agencies will love the intel. Analyze a prospect’s SEO, including health metrics (basic analysis, technical, and optimization), and show where they stand versus their competitors.
cons: Morningscore is continuing to evolve with even greater features. The recently added user management upgrade solves the issue of sharing access with stakeholders. Adding more granularity to user access would be helpful. White-label reporting is on the roadmap. Recalculating Morningscore on filtering by keyword would be helpful.

review_title: Amazing tool, incredible Customer Service
description: I had few problems when the app was launched and the customer service fixed them in seconds. Very friendly team.
author: David M.
pros: Easy to use, good recommendations to improve ranking, many tools now and more to come. An alternative to SEMRush just to focus on what you need, very nice User Interface
cons: When the Health module reports some errors and some of them are caused by the same issue, there is no way to select all to recheck if the errors were fixed, you have to manually select each one by one and recheck clicking in "refresh data". But is surely fixed in new updates.

review_title: All in one SEO Keyword Tracking with Morningscore
description: I used Morningscore over 6 months to set my keyword tracking and analyzing them for better SEO analysis. It gives you nice information about your side and competitor's one. But there are more tool that you can use.
author: Mert D.
pros: Morningscore gives you competitors keywords and its ranking that you have decided. Tool should have more feature to cover more subject in SEO and it can give you more data to prospect.
cons: Sometimes the keyword rank tracking does not work properly, when you check the real time ranking, it shows you different kind of position that Morningscore gave.

review_title: An all-in-one SEO tool with outstanding support
description: I have been using Morningscore regularly and it truly feels like having an extra team behind me. The tool provides clear insights, and the support team is always ready to help with both platform-related questions and special challenges. For me as a solo SEO consultant, this combination of simplicity and strong support makes a huge difference in my daily work.
author: Glenna N.
pros: Morningscore is easy to use, intuitive, and available in [sensitive content hidden]– which makes it very accessible. It combines keyword research, rank tracking, and SEO reporting in one place. The best part is the customer support: always fast, helpful, and with a good sense of humor. As a consultant, I also appreciate the qualified advice I can pass on to my own clients.
cons: No major drawbacks. Some advanced users might miss certain in-depth features found in larger enterprise tools, but for most businesses and consultants the balance between usability and functionality is perfect.

review_title: The student has become the master
description: In overall it has improved our entire SEO strategi and focus on progression on our webpage. Also the fact that I can ask relevant questions when I take on board proffesional SEO people since I can keep track on their work.
author: Frederik K.
pros: Overview and easy way of keeping track of what needs to be done. Both in terms of webpage health but also from the SEO point of view. After morningscore we are realy starting to focus on this making sure we have progress.
cons: Since I am not a SEO expert its hard for me to have an oppinnion in relation to critisism. Maybe the entire creditsystem for scanning the webpage but i do understand why its nessescary

review_title: Great technology - that keeps my SEO work growing
description: Overall very satisfied. The value is huuge, and keeps my business streamlined and keeps pushing my SEO results in a positive way.
author: Daniel P.
pros: It is easy to use, and absolute steller support from the Morning Score team. Keeps you motivated to keep pushing on your SEO.
cons: I would say that i yet have to find a negative thing to say about morningscore. So far, im overly happy about the solution.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Take Your SEO to the Next Level
description: I'm very happy using this tool as it helps me find link opportunities that I never found using any other SEO tools. This is the only SEO that I have used that is backed up by Ahrefs data which makes it an awesome tool.
author: Vinson Matthew L.
pros: Morningscore lets you extract valuable data from any website such as keywords, backlink profile, on page SEO, estimated traffic, and many more. You can then use the following data to create a strategic plan to outrank your competitors in search engine. Also love how this tool present its data making it easier to read even for a non tech savvy person as for every section there is a detailed explanation like how backlinks works, what's data for, and so on. Last but not the least, this is the only SEO tool that I have seen with gamification features which makes search engine optimization fun and exciting.
cons: None! The tool simply works. They have an amazing team and real SEO experts who understands the pain of delivering easy to understand reports to clients that's why they've created this tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SEO Gamification, awesome!
description: Since the beginning it has been a pleasure to use, it is really intuitive and the learning curve is minimal.
author: David J.
pros: I love the approach of Morningscore to make you aware of the money that you're saving because of your organic SEO, but the one thing that makes me log daily to Morningscore to see new missions is the game mood. I love to compete and win new buck on my Morningscore value. awesome!
cons: It still has some bugs, I use mac and Chrome and sometimes the buttons won't work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Worth double its value
author: Ramy B.
pros: This tool become our top SEO tool in our company. The detailed insights it helps you with are priceless. One of best features (for us) is the Competition keywords checking. The support team is very fast in replying to any requests. That’s a plus to me too.
cons: Nothing until now... I can’t find anything negative to report.

review_title: SEO done as easy as possible
author: Leonardo W.
pros: MorningScore is an awesome tool, first because of the quality of the data, that comes from the most updated database available, ahrefs, second, for the UI/UX, it's super easy to use and makes the life easier to solve small issues that might impact your website. The app is very easy to use and the team behind provides a very good support, implementing a lot of improvements quite often. Get it!
cons: None so far, I think this app will only grow.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very Happy With My Decision to Purchase Morningscore...Worth Every Penny!
description: I'm very happy with my decision to purchase a subscription to Morningscore. It has improved my stats and have seen results in just a few short months.
author: Christy G.
pros: I've been a blogger since Oct 2012 and never focused on learning SEO. In the past, if I ranked for something it was nice but I just wrote for my users. In Nov, I started a new blog and at the beginning of the year I made a goal to start focusing on my SEO skills. I purchased Morningscore subscription so that I could easily track my rankings and improve my SEO skills. From January until now I have gone from 900 pageviews to over 4,000. I load up my missions and work towards completing them. I still have a ways to go on learning my SEO but morningscore has made it so much easier. If you are looking to improve your SEO skills, I highly recommend purchasing this software. It is very similar to SEMRush but without the crazy price tag.
cons: It is expensive for a beginner but keep in mind that it takes spending money to make money. Your tools, including Morningscrore, is a business expense and is well worth the investment.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent SEO health checker tool
description: Accuracy is more important than anything in SEO ranking tool and Morning Score is very accurate to me as compared to many other tools in the market so I am happy with the tool.
author: Munir A.
pros: This is all in all easy to understand SEO tool that does not need a lot of efforts. User Interface is very attractive and it provides all the information related to keyword ranking, backlinks , website health in just one easy to understand keyboard. Morningscore is clearly one of the best tool I have in my portfolio amony many other SEO tools.
cons: The package I have is for 5 websites that seems too low , I wish they add more websites to the starter plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best SEO tool
description: Im really satisfied, good price and the best SEO software
author: Marc D.
pros: The morning score and link scanner, and also a easy to use SEO scanner
cons: Its still not 100% complete software :-D

review_title: Advanced yet simple to use
description: It’s much easier to show the value you provide to small business owners who do not understand in depth seo
author: Anders C.
pros: The simplicity, the pricing, fast support.
cons: Nothing it’s great, can’t wait for future updates.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great all in one SEO Tool
author: Claudio C.
pros: I enjoy the gamification aspect and the creative UI. It is also very useful to setup and track your SEO changes done and required to do in future.
cons: The only negative is a personal opinion and might not be a negative for someone else. The colour scheme where positives are shown in blue, I would have liked green and negatives shown in red.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: If you love seo tools...you gonna love morningscore
description: I love it, really good app if you work with seo
author: Ale R.
pros: What i love of morningscore is the add a value to your traffic. This aproche is correct, because if you work on seo/sem, not all keyword worth the same. So you get the traffic and the value of your traffic and you can compare against your competitors. Another feature i love is they show your traffic/value overtime in a graphic so is more easy to view and is not a plain number that you need to remember Morning score include also: - ranktracker - win and lost keyword positions - missions - win and lost traffic value - amazing support - constant improved - work with several data sources Morningscore is a really nice way to understand what happen with your seo or your competitors. - Great way to get insight - keyword ideas -
cons: Is on early stage, some features sometimes get bug and seem there is some problem with the data. The interface is not movil friendly (really anoying if you wanna check the data in your phone) No phone app
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A solid and effective SEO tool that works and is fun to use!
description: From the onboarding process right through to creating your first mission, it's been a very enjoyable experience and i don't think that often with software. The UI/UX is on point and I'm really happy with Morningscore so far and i can't wait to see what updates you bring out next. I will be recommending this to my Marketing network friends. Good job team.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: SEO can sometimes be a daunting task but Morningscore can be used by a non SEO expert and makes creating tasks 'missions' fun. As soon as you enter enter your domain and competitors, Morningscore creates suggestions on not only what to improve on your site but what to fix and then displays a difficulty level on achieving these. You then create a mission to fix these. I love how easy it is to see all of my website problems in 1 easy and intuitive to see use dashboard. Seeing what my competitors keywords are ranking for, seeing how many searches specific keywords receive each month and what my rank is for those is just incredible and Morningscore pulls this data from Ahrefs, which is very accurate and expensive to use. I haven't used all of the features yet so i'm barely scratching the surface of what this can do for any business but i would strongly recommend atleast trying Morningscore and see if it's a good fit for your business. You won't be dissapointed.
cons: I haven't used this to it's full potential YET so i can't comment on anything negative.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Morningscore: The best new SEO tool.
description: Amazing. Been using this for a while and no regrets. Amazing new requested features being added every moth like Keyword Research!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Epic new features being added all the time. The SEO data is solid and reliable at price-point unmatched by anyone else. Backed by a team that listens and is adding features other tools avoid.
cons: Some great new features still being built. But that is not a bad thing. It just means it's making steady progress!

review_title: User Friendly SEO Tool
description: I used Morningscore to drive my marketing strategy, keyword tracking and finding competitors website strategy.
author: Anil C.
pros: Morningscore is essential SEO tool to drive your marketing insight. There are lots of helpful feature to use to get know about the market.
cons: Morningscore needs to have more feature to get known for more people.

review_title: Makes SEO fun for non-technical Professionals
description: Thumbs up
author: Serena L.
pros: SEO is quite an ever-changing game for most of us who are anything but technical marketers by profession. Morningscore makes SEO fun, more specifically it gives us tips on what to do. Love the keyword tracking and backlink analysis as well. Heard they've their source from ahref, which is quite a trusted authority.
cons: Currently the backlink only shows domain rank, hopefully more data can be on the specific url instead of generalized.

review_title: The most amazing SEO SaaS
description: Great experience so far, responsive team, ongoing development.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It makes SEO understandbable for the business person by introducing its own metric - a currency - that is build to reflect the value generated by traffic and changes to that value by SEO interventions. The UI is clean, its easy to track competitors and compare key performance indicators of them. Gamification with missions and goals you can set and track for yourself (including how-to training manual for each mission) helps to stay on track. And it uses the quite expensive and rarely offerend AHREFS data, the most advanced service provider for backlink data.
cons: Some stats could be a bit more specific. Website credits will be used when tracking competitors (understandably so as the data is expensive) - that limits the scope per plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Morningscore - A SEO Tool of Great Promise
author: Delon A.
pros: It is a complete package which means you get to monitor SEO activities, do competitor analysis, track keywords, audit site, and build links with Ahrefs data integration. Next, the beginner-friendly user interface. It shows what's necessary for users rathar than cluttering the navigation with tons of uncessary options. Finally, the features and pricing deserves a mention especially for a person who's new to SEO world.
cons: It's a tool of great promise but still a lot of work to do to become a best-seller of its kind. Their roadmap is exciting and integration with Google Analytics is really a must to leverage the maximum benefit out of it. Also, it would be good if the domain count and keyword limit are increased for every plan.

review_title: Great SEO helper for beginners
description: I use it daily to track rankings for 3 of my websites. I also check the Morningscore to have a big picture of visibility changes. I also try to solve some of the missions every week.
author: Jochen G.
pros: * Morningscore is really easy to use. * You see your daily changes with one simple score. * No overwhelming set of features and menus. * Included rank tracker * The missions are the real game changer!
cons: No really cons at the moment. Still new features coming.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Beginner Friendly Interface
author: Ganesh B.
pros: Ability to Find gained / Lost back-links on Daily Basis. User Interface is Simple and Beginner Friendly.
cons: No In-depth Competitor Analysis Tool. Keyword Tracking is Not Really Accurate.

review_title: Refreshing Treat To Up Your SEO Game
description: Glad i was then a beta-tester and now a loyal user.
author: Phillip C.
pros: Missions. That's the stuff that gets you going in the Google SEO game within Morningscore. Not just that, this nifty software as a service does keyword monitoring and backlink profile. However the best part about Morningscore is the dev team willingness to listen up and improve their platform based on user's input. Respect.
cons: If Morningscore can bring in Bing SEO optimization, this will be a dream come true. Woots!
